use_cases: Landing page hero background for tech products
Animated backgrounds for SaaS landing pages
Gaming and creative tool landing pages
Dark-themed website accent and ambient effect
ai_summary: A WebGL shader-based Matrix rain animation using Three.js and custom GLSL shaders. The component renders falling digital characters with mouse-reactive distortion effects, creating an immersive dark-themed visual experience suitable for hero sections and backgrounds in tech-focused applications.
